samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>Implement a traffic light with red, yellow, green indicators and a pedestrian button. In normal conditions, the traffic light should cycle through green for 60 clocks, yellow for 5 clocks, and red for 10 clocks. When the pedestrian button is pressed, if the remaining green time is more than 10 clocks, it should be reduced to 10 clocks. If the remaining green time is less than 10 clocks, it should remain unchanged.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Pedestrian button input.</input>
        <output id="red">Red output signal.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow output signal.</output>
        <output id="green">Green output signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum name="idle">Idle state.</enum>
        <enum name="s1_red">State 1 - Red.</enum>
        <enum name="s2_yellow">State 2 - Yellow.</enum>
        <enum name="s3_green">State 3 - Green.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="cnt" width_description="[7:0]">Internal counter.</reg>
            <reg id="state" width_description="[1:0]">Current state.</reg>
            <reg id="p_red">Previous red signal.</reg>
            <reg id="p_yellow">Previous yellow signal.</reg>
            <reg id="p_green">Previous green signal.</reg>
            <always @(*)>
                <case expression="state">
                    <item value="idle">
                        <block>
                            <assign id="state" value="s1_red" />
                            <assign id="p_red" value="0" />
                            <assign id="p_yellow" value="0" />
                            <assign id="p_green" value="0" />
                        </block>
                    </item>
                    <item value="s1_red">
                        <block>
                            <if expression="cnt == 3">
                                <block>
                                    <assign id="state" value="s3_green" />
                                    <assign id="p_red" value="0" />
                                    <assign id="p_yellow" value="0" />
                                    <assign id="p_green" value="1" />
                                </block>
                            </if>
                            <else>
                                <block>
                                    <assign id="state" value="s1_red" />
                                    <assign id="p_red" value="1" />
                                    <assign id="p_yellow" value="0" />
                                    <assign id="p_green" value="0" />
                                </block>
                            </else>
                        </block>
                    </item>
                    <item value="s2_yellow">
                        <block>
                            <if expression="cnt == 3">
                                <block>
                                    <assign id="state" value="s1_red" />
                                    <assign id="p_red" value="1" />
                                    <assign id="p_yellow" value="0" />
                                    <assign id="p_green" value="0" />
                                </block>
                            </if>
                            <else>
                                <block>
                                    <assign id="state" value="s2_yellow" />
                                    <assign id="p_red" value="0" />
                                    <assign id="p_yellow" value="1" />
                                    <assign id="p_green" value="0" />
                                </block>
                            </else>
                        </block>
                    </item>
                    <item value="s3_green">
                        <block>
                            <if expression="cnt == 3">
                                <block>
                                    <assign id="state" value="s2_yellow" />
                                    <assign id="p_red" value="0" />
                                    <assign id="p_yellow" value="1" />
                                    <assign id="p_green" value="0" />
                                </block>
                            </if>
                            <else>
                                <block>
                                    <assign id="state" value="s3_green" />
                                    <assign id="p_red" value="0" />
                                    <assign id="p_yellow" value="0" />
                                    <assign id="p_green" value="1" />
                                </block>
                            </else>
                        </block>
                    </item>
                </case>
            </always>
            <always @(*)>
                <if expression="(!rst_n)">
                    <block>
                        <assign id="cnt" value="10" />
                    </block>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <block>
                        <if expression="pass_request && green)">
                            <assign id="cnt" value="10" />
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <block>
                                <if expression="!green && p_green)">
                                    <assign id="cnt" value="60" />
                                </if>
                                <else>
                                    <block>
                                        <if expression="!yellow && p_yellow)">
                                            <assign id="cnt" value="5" />
                                        </if>
                                        <else>
                                            <block>
                                                <if expression="!red && p_red)">
                                                    <assign id="cnt" value="10" />
                                                </if>
                                            </block>
                                        </else>
                                    </block>
                                </else>
                            </block>
                        </else>
                    </block>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
                <if expression="(!rst_n)">
                    <block>
                        <assign id="red" value="p_red" />
                        <assign id="yellow" value="p_yellow" />
                        <assign id="green" value="p_green" />
                    </block>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <block>
                        <assign id="red" value="p_red" />
                        <assign id="yellow" value="p_yellow" />
                        <assign id="green" value="p_green" />
                    </block>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <inlined>
            <block>
                <assign id="clock" value="cnt" />
            </block>
        </inlined>
    </task>
</module>
